allow: PowerShell($pnpmDir = Split-Path \(corepack pnpm bin -g 2>$null\) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; corepack pnpm bin -g 2>&1; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\pnpm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name -First 20)
